flow: Outer Ring Road -> Eastgate Industrial Offramp -> Industrial Oversight door -> Freight/Scrap Connector -> Rust Jackals territory
gameplay_rules: Eastgate Industrial Offramp supports vehicle approach and Industrial Oversight access.
Eastgate Rust Jackals Connector moves toward freight/scrap territory.
Use invisible Red Concord detection cones later in Phaser.
Use road/path override rectangles if thin mask artifacts snag vehicle or player.
Gate, door, and barrier panels that open/close should be separate interactive assets.

future_build_reminder.IMPERIAL_GALACTIC_NEWS_STATION: Empire propaganda news station / Red Concord media broadcast hub to build later.
